title: Domain Dal (worldship)
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
The [[Koros-Strohna|worldship]] '''''Domain Dal''''' was possessed by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Domain]] [[Domain Dal|Dal]].

==History==
After the [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Coruscant]], the ''Domain Dal'' became [[Warmaster]] [[Tsavong Lah]]'s base of operations during the [[Terraforming/Legends|Vongforming]] of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. It was attacked by the [[Starlancer Project]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Enemy Lines I: Rebel Dream]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Enemy Lines II: Rebel Stand]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
